description: Investigate root cause of unpublished articles being auto-published. Check sitemap XML scraping process. Implement fix to prevent recurrence.
Archive all articles not meant for publication yet. Notify Andrej when complete.
Manually check all published/draft articles for incorrect backlinks to archived articles. Remove/update 404 links.
Review articles flagged by Gus for missing backlinks/data. Update with correct information, focusing on verifying bold claims (e.g. 100% CRM revenue increase).
Implement feedback loop in workflow to auto-check article links, published status, and data accuracy. Apply to all current articles in drafts.
Research and create 40 new topic ideas. Focus on actionable, top-of-funnel, less technical content. Present to Gus by Monday.
Optimize metadata for 10 more poorly performing articles (incl. "Construction Industry Leads", "SEO for Construction Companies"). Complete by Friday EOD.
Schedule CRO-focused call with Gus and Alice for Tuesday, slightly later than current meeting time.
Compile and share CRO benchmarks, examples from other clients, and company-level CRO document with Gus before Tuesday's call.
